title: Write Serverpod Endpoint Tests
description: Write integration tests for a Serverpod endpoint with database interaction.
instructions:
Given a Todo endpoint that provides CRUD operations for todo items:

Write Serverpod integration tests that verify:
1. Creating a new todo item
2. Getting all todos for a user
3. Updating a todo's completion status
4. Deleting a todo
5. Authorization: user A cannot see user B's todos

Use test fixtures to set up test data and ensure proper cleanup.

hints.text: Use setUp() to create test users and tearDown() to clean up database state.
Create separate sessions for different users to test authorization.
Use the Serverpod test utilities to run endpoints with proper session context.
